creator: courtney.hicks1@icloud.com
text:
Since the 5.24.0 update, many applications do not launch in the GUI, but will from the command line. If there's a way to log any plasma errors I would like to know, everything the KDE people say is to use journalctl, which obviously won't work in FreeBSD.

Here are some applications that I can launch from terminal, but not from the task manager and application launcher (this isn't a whole list, just what I tried):

dolphin
kinfocenter
kate
gwenview
krunner

Applications that launch properly:

konsole
ksysguard
okular
seemingly all non-gtk applications

krunner can launch all the above applications.

When running the non-working applications from the command line, I see this is a common output:

QKqueueFileSystemWatcherEngine::addPaths: open: No such file or directory

I'm running 13-STABLE - 13.0-STABLE FreeBSD 13.0-STABLE #5 stable/13-n249455-5e730b3fdec
